# Good Day to you sir {mention-member} and welcome to **Skill Issues Incorporated**.
 Please __**register with Charlemagne**__ by clicking the link in {register}. **Please also prepend your server name with where you are from [UK/US/EU/etc.]**. Then you can head on over to our {SuperChannel} of channels where you can find channels for raid organising, lfg, and much more

# Welcome {mention-member} to Skill Issues Inc. Looking at you, you're gonna fit right in
 Now someone once told me that if you **visit {register} and click on the link** it opens up a whole new world. I tried, failed, but hopefully it will work for you
Don't forget to also **prepend your server name with where you are from [UK/US/EU/etc.]**
 Once you've done all that, check out {SuperChannel} for everything we offer. Even with your Skill Issues, this should be a breeze.
 Try not to blow yourself up. Good luck.
